commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled NEAR AI Cloud provider plugin with API-key onboarding, dynamic/static model catalog support, provider docs, generated inventory entries, labeler metadata, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new-provider feature PR rather than a bug report. Source review confirms current main lacks `nearai`, and the PR body provides partial after-change CLI catalog proof.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer decision on bundled provider ownership versus external plugin distribution, plus contributor live behavior proof; no narrow automated repair is identified.
